meta.summary: Fast pairwise nucleotide sequence alignment for long reads, short reads, spliced RNA-seq reads, assembly-to-assembly alignment, all-vs-all overlap, and PAF/SAM utility workflows.
meta.description: Fast pairwise nucleotide sequence alignment for long reads, short reads, spliced RNA-seq reads, assembly-to-assembly alignment, all-vs-all overlap, and PAF/SAM utility workflows.

test: paftools.js version | grep -Fx '2.30-r1287' >/dev/null && paftools.js 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: paftools.js <command>' >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v minimap2)" | grep -F 'libz' >/dev/null && ldd "$(command -v k8)" | grep -F 'libz' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-minimap2-sam && cd /tmp/taf-minimap2-sam && printf '>ref
GATTACAGTCGATCGTACCTGACCTAGGATCGATGCTAGCTTACGATCGGATCCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTTACGGATCGTAGCTACGATTCGACCTAGGTCAGTACGATCGATGCTAGGCTAACGTCGATACGGT
' > ref.fa && printf '>read1
GTCGATCGTACCTGACCTAGGATCGATGCTAGCTTACGATCGGATCCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTTACG
' > reads.fa && minimap2 -a -k9 -w5 ref.fa reads.fa > aln.sam && grep -F '@SQ' aln.sam >/dev/null && grep -F 'read1' aln.sam >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-minimap2-paf && cd /tmp/taf-minimap2-paf && printf '>ref
GATTACAGTCGATCGTACCTGACCTAGGATCGATGCTAGCTTACGATCGGATCCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTTACGGATCGTAGCTACGATTCGACCTAGGTCAGTACGATCGATGCTAGGCTAACGTCGATACGGT
' > ref.fa && printf '>read1
GTCGATCGTACCTGACCTAGGATCGATGCTAGCTTACGATCGGATCCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTTACG
' > reads.fa && minimap2 -c --cs -k9 -w5 ref.fa reads.fa > aln.paf && grep -F 'cg:Z:' aln.paf >/dev/null && paftools.js view aln.paf > view.txt && test -s view.txt

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-minimap2-index && cd /tmp/taf-minimap2-index && printf '>ref
GATTACAGTCGATCGTACCTGACCTAGGATCGATGCTAGCTTACGATCGGATCCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTTACGGATCGTAGCTACGATTCGACCTAGGTCAGTACGATCGATGCTAGGCTAACGTCGATACGGT
' > ref.fa && printf '>read1
GTCGATCGTACCTGACCTAGGATCGATGCTAGCTTACGATCGGATCCGTAGCTAGTCCGATGACCTTACG
' > reads.fa && minimap2 -k9 -w5 -d ref.mmi ref.fa && gzip -c reads.fa > reads.fa.gz && minimap2 ref.mmi reads.fa.gz > indexed.paf && grep -F 'read1' indexed.paf >/dev/null

meta.summary: Fast pairwise nucleotide sequence alignment for long reads, short reads, spliced RNA-seq reads, assembly-to-assembly alignment, all-vs-all overlap, and PAF/SAM utility workflows.

test: paftools.js version | grep -Fx '2.31-r1302' >/dev/null && paftools.js 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: paftools.js <command>' >/dev/null
paftools.js sim2bed 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: paftools.js sim2bed <sim.txt>' >/dev/null && paftools.js badread2fa 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: paftools.js badread2fa <ref.fa.fai> <badread.fq>' >/dev/null
